title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 10 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 10 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 10 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the DCE iron ore futures continued their weak trend today. The most-traded contract I2609 ultimately closedat 753.5 yuan/mt, down 0.33% from the previous trading day. Spot prices edged up 2 yuan/mt from the previous trading day.
